meaning: n.著作家,编辑者,出版者,以赌赛马为生的人
examples: William Hill, a British bookmaker, is offering odds on the election in four years' time.
In this case, in a departure from normal practice, the bookmaker had allowed the customers in question to set their own odds.
Back in August 2004, Ladbrokes, a British bookmaker, offered odds of 500 to one against gravitational waves being detected by 2010.
The Irish bookmaker Paddy Power has weighed in on what the LHC will find first.
Now, at least one online bookmaker is letting bettors speculate on Pope Francis' future.
